content.text:
[Workflow Task from Orchestrator]
Workflow ID: f20739e6-c48
Subtask ID: a1b02bcd
Priority: 1

Task: Verify general worker agents (general-1 through general-4) are operational on ports 18811-18814. Check /health on each. Report status and restart any that are down.

content.thinking:
The user wants me to verify that the general worker agents (general-1 through general-4) are operational on ports 18811-18814. I need to:
1. Check the /health endpoint on each port
2. Report status
3. Restart any that are down

Let me start by checking the health of each worker. I

content.text: I'll verify all four general workers by checking their health

arguments.command: for port in 18811 18812 18813 18814; do echo "=== Port $port ==="; curl -s http://localhost:$port/health || echo "FAILED"; done

content.thinking: All four workers are healthy and online. Let me double-check by also pinging via sessions_send to confirm

content.text: All workers responding to health checks. Let me verify they're accepting tasks by

content.thinking: Interesting - all 4 workers timed out when I tried to send them a message. Let me check their logs to see what's going on and try to list active sessions to see if they show up as running

content.text: Health checks pass but message send timed out
